name: r/d dog food
description: just like the human obesity epidemic, over 50% of the pet population is overweight. even a little extra weight can impact the pet's quality of life and relationship with family because that extra weight can reduce play time, impact mobility and affect the lifelong general health of your dog. hill's nutritionists & veterinarians developed prescription diet r/d clinical nutrition specially formulated to support dogs' weight loss. in fact, r/d is clinically proven nutrition for healthy weight loss in just 8 weeks. this dry food has an irresistible chicken flavor that dogs love.
